edges.target:
function:src/openhuman/memory/sync_pipeline_e2e_tests.rs:collector
        .events
        .lock()
        .unwrap()
        .iter()
        .filter_map(|e| match e {
            DomainEvent::MemorySyncStageChanged { stage, .. } => Some(stage.clone()),
            _ => None,
        }).collect

function:src/openhuman/memory/sync.rs:collector
            .events
            .lock()
            .unwrap()
            .iter()
            .filter_map(|event| match event {
                DomainEvent::MemorySyncStageChanged { stage, .. } => Some(stage.clone()),
                _ => None,
            }).collect

function:src/openhuman/memory/sync.rs:collector
            .events
            .lock()
            .unwrap()
            .iter()
            .find_map(|event| match event {
                DomainEvent::MemorySyncStageChanged {
                    stage,
                    connection_id,
                    source_id,
                    ..
                } if stage == "ingesting" => Some((connection_id.clone(), source_id.clone())),
                _ => None,
            }).expect
